vw.ra.needAll: Object type, object, role and assignee are required.
vw.ra.polHint: Single-assignee roles allow ONE holder per object at a time (overlapping dates are rejected). Group roles allow many holders at once — the step's quorum decides how many must act. The rule applies to NEW assignments only.
vw.ra.polOverlapWarn: Saved — but existing overlapping assignments remain in effect until ended. Objects with overlaps:
vw.ra.replaceHint: The current assignment ends the day before the effective date.
vw.ra.subtitle: Who holds each workflow role, per business object, date-tracked
vw.ra.title: Role Assignments
vw.userEdit.subtitle: Complete all required fields then click Save
wf.worklistSub: Everything waiting on you, across every module.
vw.ra.mrHint: Assignment roles are labels the workflow resolves people by (they grant no permissions). Deactivating a role hides it from pickers and stops resolution; existing assignments are kept for history.
vw.ra.mrInUseWarn: Saved — but this role still has active assignments. They stay in history but will no longer resolve. Count:
vw.ra.moInUseWarn: Saved — but this object type still has active assignments. They stay in history but will no longer resolve. Count:
vw.ra.moHint: Object types tell the platform where each business object's list of values lives (a database view) and how its key behaves. Adding a type here makes it assignable immediately — no deployment.
vw.ra.moViewHint: The database view the object picker reads. Search, then choose — every column below comes from the chosen view, nothing is free-typed.
vw.mydel.title: My Delegations
vw.mydel.subtitle: Going on leave? Delegate your approval authority to a colleague for a date window — tasks reach them within minutes, and stop when the window ends.
vw.mydel.newHint: The delegate acts alongside you on your approval tasks during the window — existing pending tasks are covered too. You can cancel at any time.
vw.mydel.emptyOutSub: Create one before going on leave so approvals don't wait for you.
vw.mydel.needDelegate: Pick who will act on your behalf.
vw.mydel.needModule: Pick the module this delegation covers.
